name: Srinivas
title: Software Engineer
tagline: Engineer focused on automation, agentic AI, and accelerating large-scale system modernization.
about: I am a Software Engineer at IBM India Software Labs, focused on building systems that automate complex workflows, improve developer productivity, and accelerate modernization of large-scale enterprise platforms. My work involves designing backend systems, developer tooling, and AI-assisted solutions that simplify traditionally complex tasks such as migrations and system analysis. Recently, I have been working on agentic AI-based tooling, building tools that run on legacy systems and intelligent agents that interact with these tools through a natural language interface. This allows developers to perform complex workflows through a simple AI-driven chat interface, dramatically improving usability, speed, and efficiency. I enjoy solving difficult engineering problems, building automation that removes manual work, and designing systems that make complex technology easier to use. My long-term goal is to grow into a technical leader and architect, designing large-scale systems and building platforms that enable entire teams to move faster.
